subcodes.first_line: Remind ye the letters Mim and Shin that they may be enabled to fulfill their obligations, for some have succeeded [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جناب م و ش را تذکر دارید به اداى حقوق موفق شوند زیرا بعضى موفق
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
